creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191840
py-django-rest-swagger.shar

Hello,

attached is the shar file for the Python package py-django-rest-swagger, an API documentation generator for the Swagger UI and the Django REST framework.

Note:
The package depends on following Python packages:

- py-coreapi (see PR #226943: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=226943)
- py-openapi-codec (see PR #226949: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=226949)

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64) for py27 + py36 flavors -> OK
- portlint -> OK

--
Cheers
Kai
